Buen servicio y atención.  El  24/7/23 cargamos diesel infinia.  $ 352. el litro.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service and attention. We filled up with Infinia diesel on July 24, 2023. It was $352 per liter.

reviews.comment:
Se exceden con los precios tanto de los combustibles como dentro del YPF full. Recomiendo cargar en algún lugar antes y llenar el tanque.

(Translated by Google)
They're going too far with the prices, both for fuel and at YPF. I recommend filling up somewhere beforehand and filling up your tank.
